title: The World Turns on a Clan
description: On pages 14–14, this part follows Unknown person #13 as The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.
scene: The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.

dialogue.text: pirates keep coming one after another!
